name: cafe-platform
description: Nexovo Cafe System — enterprise restaurant ERP, POS, KDS, and ordering (INR).

scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n api,customer,admin -c blue,green,yellow "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:customer" "npm run dev:admin"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @cafe/contracts && npm run build -w @cafe/api
scripts.lint: npm run build -w @cafe/contracts && npm run lint -w @cafe/contracts && npm run lint -w @cafe/api
